titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 19: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 19. (A.R. No. 245 of 1911.) KUMBHAKŌṆAM, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the West and South walls, central shrine, Nāgēśvarasvāmin temple.

p.hi: Year 4 Mēsha, Thursday, Navami Maghā = 975 A.D., April 22.

summary.p: Damaged in several places. Registers a sale of quarter chey of land by the temple-administrative body, Mūlaparaḍai-perumakkaḷ of Tirukkuḍamukkil in Pāmbūrnāḍu, to a lady, Kaṟṟaḷippirāṭṭi Aṟivāḷaṉmitravalli, a resident of Tañjāvūr in Tañjāvūrkūṟṟam for 25 kaḻañju of gold. The lady in turn endowed the land to the temple, for burning a perpetual lamp to the deity Tirukkīḻkkōṭṭattu-paramasvāmi, for the merit of her son Kārikoḻambaṉ, a member of Gaṇḍarāditta-teriñja-kaikkōḷar. The land sold by the mūlaparuḍai-perumakkaḷ to the lady is said to have been the abhishēka-dakshiṇai received by the assembly evidently on the occasion of the king's coronation. The mūlapparuḍaipperumakkaḷ had authorized the temple śrīkāriyam to burn the perpetual lamp with the amount of paddy received as bhōgam for the land.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XIX No. 95.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kopparakeśaripatmaṟkku yāṇṭu 4Āvatu vaṭakaraip pām
pūrnāṭṭu tevatāṉam tirukkuṭamukkil mulaparaṭai perumakkaḷom Iyāṇṭu meṣaṉāyaṟṟu viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum navamiyum peṟṟa makattiṉṉāṉṟu tirukkuṭamukkil mulaparaṭaip perumakkaḷom tañcāvūrkkūṟṟattu tañcāvūrk kaṟṟaḷippirāṭṭi
Aṟivāḷa ṉamittiravalli taṉ makaṉ kaṇṭarātittat teriñcakaiyk koḷaril kāri koḻampaṉaic cāttit tirukkiḻk koṭṭattup paramasvāmikku vaiytta tirunontāviḷakku Oṉṟiṉukku Ivaḷukku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu
ṣekadakṣaṇai peṟṟa caṉṉa meṟ kāviri t tirukkiḻk koṭṭattu paramasvāmikku viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilattil Aḷantu mekāṟcey viṟṟukkuṭuttataṟ kellai Idevar nilattukkey meṟkun teṉpāṟkellai paḷḷikoṇṭaruḷukiṉṟa paramasvāmi nilattukku vaṭakku melpāṟkkellai Innilattukku pāyūm vāykkālukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ipperumāḷ nilattukkey teṟkumāka Iv
ṭṭa nilam Aḷantu (1/4) kāṟce k kuṭuttu Ik kāṟceyyiṉ bhoga nel koṇṭu cantrādittaval I nontā viḷakku Erippatāka Ivaḷiṭaik koṇṭa poṉ 2 10 5 Ippoṉ Irupattaiyṅkaḻaiñcu Āvaṇakkaḷatte kaikkellak koṇṭu Ippoṉ Irupattaiyṅ kaḻaiñcum Emperumāṉ śrībhaṇṭārat ppittu Ittirunontāviḷakku Oṉṟum Avvav Āṇṭu śrī kāryyañce
ppak kaṭavarākavum Ipparicup paṇitto mulaparaṭaip perumakkaḷom mula perumakkaḷ paṇiyāl I ṉeṉ Ivvūr taccaṉ pirāntakaṉ Ari ṉeṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 19 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
